key_suppliers: Oil and natural gas refiners (sulfur suppliers)
North American oil and natural gas refiners
dependencies: Sulfur from North American oil and gas refiners
Ammonia from CF Industries and spot market suppliers
Natural gas for ammonia production and potash mining
Phosphate rock from owned mines in Florida, Brazil, and Peru
Canpotex export association for international potash sales
risks: Reduced oil refinery operating rates could decrease sulfur availability
Volatile pricing and availability of sulfur, ammonia, and natural gas
Concentration of phosphate production in Florida subject to hurricanes
Brine inflows at potash shaft mines
Single-source dependencies for certain raw materials
Supply chain challenges including transportation and labor shortages

regulatory_risks: Environmental regulations (EPA RCRA compliance, water quality standards, greenhouse gas emissions)
Permitting requirements for mining operations (delays, denials, or restrictive conditions)
Financial assurance requirements for reclamation and closure obligations
Canadian resource taxes and royalties (Potash Production Tax, resource surcharge)
Brazilian mining and environmental regulations (ANM oversight, CFEM resource taxes)
Climate change regulations (Paris Agreement commitments, carbon taxes in Canada)
Countervailing duty orders on phosphate imports from Morocco and Russia
U.S. tariffs on Canadian potash imports (25% tariff risk)
Trade protection laws and tariff changes
CERCLA (Superfund) liability for hazardous substance releases
Consent decrees with EPA and state regulators (Florida, Louisiana)
Water management and treatment requirements (FDEP, EPA)
Tax regulations and audit practices (U.S., Canada, Brazil)

sanction_risks: Russia-Ukraine conflict and related sanctions impacting raw material supply
Countervailing duty orders on phosphate imports from Morocco and Russia
U.S. tariffs on Canadian potash (25% tariff risk)
Retaliatory tariffs by Canada on U.S. exports
Trade tensions between U.S. and China affecting product tariffs
Political and economic instability in Brazil and Peru
Government-imposed restrictions on exports (e.g., Chinese phosphate export taxes)
